nasb.text: Her consecrated ones were purer than snow, They were whiter than milk; They were more ruddy in body than corals, Their polishing was like lapis lazuli.

esv.text: Her princes were purer than snow, whiter than milk; their bodies were more ruddy than coral, the beauty of their form was like sapphire.

cnv.text: 錫安的貴族素來比雪更明亮，比奶更潔白； 他們的身體比紅寶石更紅潤，他們的樣貌像藍寶石一樣美麗。

ccb.text: 锡安的首领曾比雪纯净， 比奶更白， 身体比红宝石更红润， 相貌美如蓝宝石。
